questionHtml: Write down a tour that is strictly greater than your lower bound and strictly less than your upper bound.
markschemeHtml:
any valid tour, within their interval from part (f), from any starting point OR
any valid tour that starts and finishes at N          (M1)

valid tour starting point N AND within their interval         A1
e.g. NDCLSN (weight 234)

 

Note: If part (f) not correct, only award A1FT if their valid tour begins and ends at N AND lies within BOTH their interval (including if one-sided) in part (f) AND 219≤C≤248.

If no response in the form of an interval seen in part (f) then award M1A0 for a valid tour beginning and ending at N AND within 219≤C≤248.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Write down a tour that is strictly greater than your lower bound and strictly less than your upper bound.
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 3.16—Tree and cycle algorithms, Chinese postman, travelling salesman
